evals.prompt: 帮我下载《了不起的盖茨比》这本书
evals.expected_output: 应使用 annas-download download --title "The Great Gatsby" --lang en 命令搜索并下载

evals.prompt: Search for a PDF of "Designing Data-Intensive Applications"
evals.expected_output: 应使用 annas-download search --title "Designing Data-Intensive Applications" --format pdf 命令搜索

evals.prompt: I have an MD5 hash a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8, download that book for me
evals.expected_output: 应使用 annas-download download --md5 a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8 命令直接下载
